flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Saint Anselm College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.9k → $48.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Saint Anselm College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.9k → $48.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Saint Anselm College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Saint Anselm College are 43% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($73.4k vs $51.3k).
